name: 6p25_3_FOXC1_subtelomeric_SD
description: 6p25.3 subtelomeric SD region containing FOXC1, FOXF2, FOXQ1 (forkhead-paralog cluster) and DUSP22. Recurrent 6p25.3 microdeletion / microduplication syndromes cause Axenfeld-Rieger anomaly type 3 (FOXC1 haploinsufficiency) and a distinct duplication phenotype. Flanking subtelomeric SDs at ~96% identity drive the rearrangement.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD-rich block; FOXC1/FOXF2/FOXQ1 forkhead paralogs share 50-70% protein identity within the cluster and with FOXC2 (16q24); flanking duplicons of ~30-100 kb at 95-97% identity.
